messages.text: Provider-free curve corpus generated from fixed-weather Prague prototype pass samples.
Local hills, buildings, or trees may affect exact visibility near the horizon.
This JVM prototype uses fixed weather while exercising real Astronomy Engine Moon and Sun samples.

diagnostics.note: Prototype only: fixture weather, no persistence, HTTP API, database, or backend framework.
diagnostics.selectionRule: Moon passes are bounded by horizon crossings; recommendation windows inside a pass may be split by peak altitude or configured altitude thresholds.
